speaker: Daiana Fernández Molero
text: The discussion of populism should distinguish style from substance, and further distinguish economic populism (short-term giveaways producing inflation and poverty cycles) from political populism (denial of pluralism, erosion of institutions); by this taxonomy Milei is neither, despite his style.
context: Invoked Dornbusch and Mueller's framework on populism; cited Peronism as economic populism. [word uncertain in source]

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
